goal: Write a 50-page historical book on India, part by part, with detailed analysis. Use internal knowledge. Compile into a professional document.

steps.name: Outline book structure
steps.description: Create a detailed outline for a 50-page historical book on India, divided into 10 chapters covering Ancient, Medieval, Colonial, and Modern periods.
steps.done_when: File 'outline.txt' exists with 10 chapter titles and sub-topics.

steps.name: Draft chapters 1-3
steps.description: Write the content for the first three chapters (Ancient India: Indus Valley, Vedic Period, Mauryan/Gupta Empires) into 'chapters_1_3.txt'.
steps.done_when: File 'chapters_1_3.txt' contains approximately 15 pages of content.

steps.name: Draft chapters 4-6
steps.description: Write the content for chapters 4-6 (Medieval India: Delhi Sultanate, Mughal Empire, Regional Kingdoms) into 'chapters_4_6.txt'.
steps.done_when: File 'chapters_4_6.txt' contains approximately 15 pages of content.

steps.name: Draft chapters 7-10
steps.description: Write the content for chapters 7-10 (Colonial Rule, Independence Movement, Modern India) into 'chapters_7_10.txt'.
steps.done_when: File 'chapters_7_10.txt' contains approximately 20 pages of content.

steps.name: Compile document
steps.description: Read all chapter files and compile them into a single professional document using the docx_generator tool.
steps.done_when: File 'History_of_India.docx' is generated with all content included.

steps.name: Notify user
steps.description: Send a desktop notification confirming the completion of the 50-page historical book.
